completed_tasks.name: notification system analysis — full read of notifications.js, views/notifications.js, CSS, index.html
double-header bug fix (notifications.js renderDropdownRows + index.html footer onclick)
spike 003a/b: icon set comparison (SVG inline vs symbol)
completed_tasks.verdict: VALIDATED — 003a inline SVG wins. All 16 types distinct at badge size.

completed_tasks.name: spike 004a/b: dropdown animation comparison (slide-translateY vs scale-scaleY)
completed_tasks.verdict: VALIDATED — 004a translateY(-12px→0) wins. scaleY squashes row text mid-animation.

completed_tasks.name: spike 005: unread row indicator design (left-border accent vs full-block #eff6ff vs dot)
completed_tasks.verdict: VALIDATED — Variant B wins: 3px #1a73e8 left-border + #f8fbff pale tint. Best signal/interference balance.

human_actions_pending: Open .planning/spikes/004-dropdown-animation/spike.html in browser — validate animation feel (especially 004a vs 004b side-by-side). Adjust duration/easing controls to confirm 200ms ease-out.
Open .planning/spikes/005-unread-indicator/spike.html in browser — validate Variant B (left-border) vs A (full-block) vs C (dot). Confirm border width (3px) and tint (#f8fbff).

decisions.decision: 003a inline SVG wins over 003b symbol defs
Heroicons outline set (24x24, stroke-width 1.75, round linecap/linejoin) for all 16 types
decisions.rationale: Uniform visual weight, resolves all icon conflicts, eliminates emoji
Content readable throughout animation; scaleY squashes text rows

decisions.decision: 200ms ease-out for open, same for close
decisions.rationale: Snappy without feeling abrupt; validated via duration control

decisions.decision: Variant B unread indicator: 3px #1a73e8 left-border + #f8fbff tint
decisions.rationale: Best signal without tinting badge zone; transparent border anchor keeps alignment

next_action: USER: open both spike HTMLs in browser to validate animation feel and unread indicator variant. Then: /gsd:plan-phase for the notification polish implementation phase (apply all 5 spike decisions to notifications.js + notifications-history view + components.css).
context_notes: All 5 spikes complete. Implementation decisions locked: inline SVG icons (003a), translateY slide animation 200ms ease-out (004a), left-border + pale tint unread indicator (005). The double-header bug was fixed inline during spike 003 (commit f44df1e). Ready to plan the implementation phase.
